summary: Postinstall drops persistent C2 agent polling hardcoded bare-IP host for shell commands
details: The package's postinstall hook (package.json scripts.postinstall runs install.js) copies install.js to /tmp/.pm-agent.js, spawns it as a detached Node process, and appends a per-minute crontab entry that re-launches the agent if not running. The agent polls http://152.53.120.90/cmd/commands over plain HTTP, executes each returned command via bash -c as the installing user, and POSTs stdout/stderr/exit code back to http://152.53.120.90/cmd/results. Installation on any machine establishes a persistent remote-shell backdoor and an arbitrary-data exfiltration channel to the hardcoded bare-IP operator endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
